name: Long Island Iced Tea
recipeIngredient: 1/2 to 1 shot sour mix (or Tom Collins or Whiskey Sour mix)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pitcher, add the tequila and stir gently.
2. Add the Coca-Cola and continue stirring until well combined.
3. Pour in the vodka, gin, and rum, stirring slowly to ensure all ingredients are mixed thoroughly.
4. Add the sour mix (or Tom Collins or Whiskey Sour mix) according to preference, stirring until incorporated.
5. Serve over ice and enjoy your Long Island Iced Tea.
